session_validator_t(3) Library Functions Manual session_validator_t(3)

NAME

session_validator_t - Session string format validator using PCRE2.

SYNOPSIS

Data Fields


pcre2_code * session_regex
pcre2_jit_stack * jit_stack
bool initialized

Detailed Description

Session string format validator using PCRE2.

Validates the format adjective-noun-noun with regex:

  • Each word is 2-12 lowercase letters
  • Exactly 2 hyphens separating 3 words
  • No leading/trailing hyphens
  • No consecutive hyphens

This regex validator handles FORMAT validation only. Dictionary validation (adjective/noun caches) is handled separately.

Definition at line 168 of file discovery/strings.c.
